target.title: fix(msteams): escape markup in mention display names
target.body:
**Summary:** `parseMentions` embedded display names inside `<at>â€¦</at>` tags without HTML-escaping, so a name containing `<`, `>`, or `&` (e.g. `Alice <Admin> & Bob`) corrupted the Teams mention entity payload.

## What Problem This Solves

The Teams adapter builds mention entities by interpolating the raw display name into `<at>{name}</at>`. Microsoft Teams requires the `entity.text` field to match a literal substring of the outbound `activity.text`; it also parses that field for nested markup. A display name such as:

- `Alice <Admin> & Bob` â†’ `<at>Alice <Admin> & Bob</at>` (raw `<` / `>` / `&` inside the tag)
- `<at>Eve</at>` â†’ `<at><at>Eve</at></at>` (nested mention injection)

produces malformed JSON payloads that Teams rejects or renders incorrectly.

## Fix

Added `escapeTeamsMentionText(value)` that replaces `&` â†’ `&`, `<` â†’ `<`, `>` â†’ `>` before wrapping in `<at>â€¦</at>`. The `mentioned.name` field is left unescaped so the display name stored in the entity record remains human-readable.

## Evidence

Real `parseMentions` function driven on the PR branch (`node --import tsx`):

```text
[angle brackets + ampersand injection]
  raw display name:          Alice <Admin> & Bob
  entity.text in payload:    <at>Alice <Admin> & Bob</at>
  entity.mentioned.name:     Alice <Admin> & Bob
  unescaped angle bracket inside <at>: false

[nested <at> injection]
  raw display name:          <at>Eve</at>
  entity.text in payload:    <at><at>Eve</at></at>
  entity.mentioned.name:     <at>Eve</at>
  unescaped angle bracket inside <at>: false

[clean name (no change expected)]
  raw display name:          Normal Name
  entity.text in payload:    <at>Normal Name</at>
  unescaped angle bracket inside <at>: false

âś… Mention display names are HTML-escaped in the Teams entity payload.
```

## Tests

`extensions/msteams/src/mentions.test.ts` â€” regression tests added:
- `escapes angle brackets and ampersands in mention display names` â€” `<Admin>` and `&` are escaped in `entity.text`, raw name preserved in `mentioned.name`
- `prevents nested <at> injection in mention display names` â€” nested `<at>Eve</at>` name is fully escaped
- `does not escape clean display names` â€” no-op for plain ASCII names
target.author: llagy009
